generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 New security measures are being debated in Congress, and it's crucial we get this right. While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is that moderate expansions of domestic security powers have consistently shown to deter threats without major infringements. Look at the 2024 reforms - crime rates dropped 12% in pilot cities with no reported abuses. We can't afford to be the weak link in global security. #NationalSecurityMatters #BalancedApproach
